title: Urban & City Use
desc: Daily driving in cities and densely populated areas, including short-distance deliveries, stop-and-go traffic, tight parking situations, and frequent loading and unloading in urban environments.

title: Intercity & Long-Distance Driving
desc: Regular highway and long-distance journeys between cities or regions, prioritising driver comfort, fuel efficiency, cruise control, and extended range for professional or personal travel.

title: Transport of People & Materials
desc: Moving passengers or mixed loads of people and cargo, requiring flexible seating configurations, easy access, safety features, and sufficient cargo space for tools, equipment or luggage.

title: Heavy-Duty & Job-Site Use
desc: Operating on construction sites, industrial premises, or rough terrain where the vehicle must carry heavy tools, withstand demanding conditions, and provide robust load capacity and durability.

title: Delivery & Logistics Scenarios
desc: Last-mile and regional delivery operations including parcel, food, or goods distribution, where cargo volume, quick loading access, route efficiency, and low total cost of ownership are critical.

title: Mobile Workspace
desc: Using the van as a fully equipped office or workshop on wheels, enabling technicians, field sales teams, or service professionals to work productively while on the road between appointments.

title: Challenging Terrain & Weather
desc: Driving in extreme weather conditions or off-road environments such as snow, mud, steep gradients, or unpaved tracks, requiring all-wheel drive, enhanced traction control, and robust underbody protection.

title: General Business Use
desc: Versatile everyday business operations covering a mix of transport, client visits, light deliveries, and errands, where reliability, low running costs, and a professional appearance matter most.
